nasb.text: for he was looking for the city which has foundations, whose architect and builder is God.

esv.text: For he was looking forward to the city that has foundations, whose designer and builder is God.

cnv.text: 因為他等待那座有根基的城，就是　神所設計所建造的。

ccb.text: 因为他盼望的是一座有根基的城，是由上帝设计、建造的。

csbs.text: 因为他等待着那座有根基的城；那城是神所设计、所建造的。
